title: Create: Dreams of Flight
description: A steampunk-ish Create modpack with a focus on steam-age aesthetics and building
body:
# Create: Dreams of Flight
_A steampunk-ish Create modpack with a focus on contraptions and role-playing._

## Features
- ⚙️ **Create** all the contraptions your heart desires thanks to Create and its many addons.
- ✈️ **Fly**, **sail** or **drive** your new contraptions using Valkyrien Skies, Trackwork and Clockwork.
- ⚒️ **Build** with new blocks from Chipped, Create Deco and Dawn of Time and the help of copycat blocks.
- 🌱 **Farm** and **cook** with the help of Farmer's Delight and Let's Do mods.
- 🗺️ **Explore** a vanilla+ world featuring new biomes and structures thanks to Distant Horizons.
- ⚡ All **optimised** thanks to Sodium and many other performance mods.

## Notes
This pack is mainly intended private use on a server with me and my friends. While it should work well, I can't guarantee it nor can I help with issues.
